## Rule idea

What should Screenslop detect?

## Why it matters

What real UI problem does it catch?

## Required evidence

What evidence proves it?

- [ ] AX node
- [ ] screenshot region
- [ ] logs
- [ ] source hint
- [ ] other:

## Suggested fix

What should an agent do after this finding appears?
